title: cyperus retroflexus var. pumilus
intro: Cyperus retroflexus var. pumilus, commonly known as Dwarf umbrella sedge, is a small, herbaceous perennial plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyperus retroflexus var. pumilus include its potential to aid in the treatment of various health issues, such as digestive problems, respiratory infections, and skin conditions, due to its antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is also used in traditional Indian medicine to make a paste or powder for topical application.
